title: HomeLife 3200w Hurricane v2 Steam Iron with Ceramic Soleplate - Large Capacity 400ml Water Tank - Anti-Drip and Anti-Calc - E7732 - Black & Red
availability_text: Only 6 left in stock (more on the way).
features: HIGH PERFORMANCE: This super powerful 3200w steam iron is fast heating with additional steam capacity for the quick removal of creases. The standard steam rate is 50g per minute with the shot of steam being an impressive 150g per minute!
SMOOTH FINISH: The ceramic soleplate effortlessly glides over fabrics allowing you to iron out even the deepest of creases with ease.

EXTRA LARGE TANK AND LONG CORD: The generous 2.6m tangle-free cord will allow you to iron larger items with ease whilst the large 400ml water tank will last so much longer than your regular steam iron
SELF CLEANING AND LONG LASTING: Complete with an anti-drip function and an integrated anti-calc system, the exceptional steam performance does not diminish over time.
MULTI STEAM FUNCTIONS: Choose from steam, vertical steam, shot of steam, dry and spray options.
description: From the manufacturer 3200W Steam Iron – 150g/min Steam Boost, 400ml Tank Glide effortlessly over fabrics with a smooth ceramic soleplate that ensures even heat distribution and snag-free ironing. The 2.6m extra-long cord gives you greater freedom and flexibility while you work. Designed for comfort, precision, and convenience in every press. 3200W Steam Iron – 150g/min Steam Boost, 400ml Tank Power through wrinkles with a 150g/min steam shot and 3200W of performance. Features a large 400ml water tank, plus Anti-Drip, Anti-Calc and Self-Clean functions for smooth, hassle-free ironing. A Trusted Brand Offering a Wide Range of Quality Household Products. From steam irons to vacuum cleaners to torches and outdoor gear, each item is made to be user-friendly, ergonomic and help you get daily tasks done quickly and easily.
